name: Cross-Account Trust Abuse Actors
description: Cross-Account Trust Abuse Actors exploit misconfigured AWS IAM trust policies, role assumptions, and federated access paths to move laterally across accounts, escalate privileges, and gain persistent cloud access. Instead of relying on endpoint compromise, these actors abuse legitimate AssumeRole...
